login.title: Login to Reliquary
login.registerLink: No token? Register with Invite Code
login.errorToken: Invalid token or user not found
login.contactAdmin: Contact admin for an invite code
login.loginLink: Have a token? Back to Login
login.successDesc: Your account has been created successfully.
login.tokenWarning: Please save this token securely. You won't be able to see it again.

dashboard.title: Device Management
dashboard.subtitle: Manage connected Reliquary clients
dashboard.noDevicesDesc: Start a Reliquary client to see it here

history.title: History
history.subtitle: View voice recognition history
history.errorLoad: Failed to load logs, please check backend API
history.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? This cannot be undone.
history.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this recording? It will be removed from your history permanently.
history.confirmClearDayDesc: This will permanently delete all records and audio files for this day. This action cannot be undone.

config.hotkeyWarning: Note: Only single keys supported (e.g. Right Shift, F9). Some keys may be intercepted by system.
config.apiKeyDesc: Groq API Key, get from https://console.groq.com/keys

pipelineConfig.title: Pipeline Config
pipelineConfig.subtitle: Customize keywords and prompts for each pipeline step
pipelineConfig.keywordsDesc: One word per line, max 10. Add words that are frequently misrecognized. Spaces, commas, or newlines all work.
pipelineConfig.userPromptDesc: Additional correction rules for this step.
pipelineConfig.userPromptPlaceholder:
e.g. Do not use dashes or ellipses
Do not change the meaning of the original text

landing.heroDesc: Most people utilize less than 1% of LLM capabilities.
landing.heroDesc2: Relax. Reliquary is your broadband link to the Super-Individual.

sovereignty.title: Digital Sovereignty
sovereignty.desc: Your data is the only ticket for AI to become your 'exocortex'. Big tech models only know general knowledge, not you. Reliquary helps you accumulate a private Data Lake, allowing future AI to truly understand your context and become an irreplaceable exclusive assistant.

recall.title: Total Recall
recall.desc: Reject 'data tombs' and keep memories on standby. Automatically convert unstructured voice streams into structured assets. Whether it's an inspiration from last week or meeting details from last year, everything can be indexed and mined.

efficiency.title: Ultimate Efficiency
efficiency.desc: 3x faster than typing, with 100% complete context. Eliminate aggressive interruption mechanisms, allowing you to articulate complex trains of thought in one go. Comprehensive long contexts significantly reduce AI hallucinations, resulting in higher output quality.

cost.title: Zero Cost
cost.desc: Enjoy enterprise-grade speed for free. Through ingenious architectural design, legally utilize free API tiers from top tech companies (like Groq). Handle hundreds of high-intensity instructions daily with sub-second response times, without spending a penny.

pipeline.title: Programmable Pipeline
pipeline.desc: Define your workflow like building blocks. How data flows and is processed is entirely up to you. Through simple natural language configuration, you can customize rules: automatically extract to-dos, filter sensitive words, or push to a Kanban board.

fortress.title: Private Fortress
fortress.desc: Physical-level security with one-click convenience. Minimalist Docker deployment, service up in 30 seconds. Data is securely locked on your local hard drive, physically isolated from any cloud censorship or prying eyes.

deployment.title: Get Started
deployment.subtitle: Choose the best way to deploy. We also provide a one-click trial environment.

client.mac: Recommended to use Homebrew, we'll handle audio permissions automatically.
client.mac_usage: Run from command line after installation.
client.mac_usage_step1: Enter server URL (Local: http://localhost:8080, Remote: Your Server URL)
client.mac_usage_step2: Enter your personal access token (get from backend settings)
client.win: Use Scoop for the best experience.
client.win_usage: Run from command line after installation.
client.android: Android client is not on Google Play yet, please download via APK.
client.android_steps:
Enable "Install from Unknown Sources"
Download and install latest APK
client.ios: iOS client is under development. Coming soon.
client.pending: Feature under development. Please watch our GitHub repository for updates.

server.prod: Production deployment using docker-compose.prod.yml. Please configure .env.
server.trial: No deployment needed. Data will be destroyed after 24 hours.

trial.title: Trial Only, No Data Retention
trial.desc: Non-commercial service. Trial mode is for testing without deployment.
trial.warning: Your account and ALL data will be permanently deleted after 24 hours.

deployment.groqWarning: Note: You must enter the Groq API Key in the backend settings, otherwise it will not work.
